title: VedaGlow — Ayurvedic Skincare Brand
description: A complete brand identity for VedaGlow, an Ayurvedic skincare brand. The design captures the essence of purity, calm, and radiance through an earthy, botanical color palette and elegant typography. Deliverables include logo design, product packaging, and social media creatives for the launch campaign.

images.alt: VedaGlow Aloe Face Cream promotional ad
images.heading: Logo design
images.writeup: Concept that we use: Nature + Radiance The VedaGlow logo combines a botanical leaf and a glowing drop to represent the fusion of natural ingredients and radiant skin. The leaf symbolizes purity and herbal wisdom, while the drop reflects skincare hydration and nourishment. The surrounding glow represents healthy,luminous skin — the ultimate result of VedaGlow products

images.alt: VedaGlow Kumkumadi Glow Serum product packaging
images.heading: Packaging Design — Kumkumadi Glow Serum
images.writeup: Complete packaging design for the Kumkumadi Glow Serum. The packaging uses VedaGlow's signature earthy palette with botanical motifs, creating a cohesive brand experience from shelf to skincare routine.

images.alt: VedaGlow Kumkumadi Glow Serum social media ad
images.heading: Box Packaging Design

images.alt: VedaGlow Aloe Face Cream shop now creative
images.heading: Social Media Creatives
images.writeup: An social media creative for the Veda Glow, designed to drive conversions with a clear call-to-action and appealing product presentation. The warm, inviting aesthetic aligns with VedaGlow's brand identity.

images.alt: VedaGlow Aloe Face Cream shop now creative
